title: Action verbs sprint
description: Quick verbs — train action-words for daily writing speed
text: run jump write read type code learn teach build make plan ship test fix find search send share open close start stop help play work move keep show
tips: Action verbs appear in 30% of all writing
Each verb should feel like a beat — boom, boom, boom

character_tips.anna: Verbs drive sentences. Drilling them = drilling 30% of all your writing.
character_tips.maxim: These are the engine words. Practice = speed in any context.
character_tips.knopych: ACTION! POW! BAM! 💥 Verbs hit hard!
character_tips.klavochka: Each word a heartbeat, my dear 💖
